title: MaFgLib
description: MaLiLib unofficial forge port. Library mod for the (Neo)Forge port of masa's mods.
body: # MaFgLib **This mod requires [BadPackets](https://modrinth.com/mod/badpackets) in 1.20.4 ~ 1.20.6 and 1.21.x-0.2.3 below.** This mod is a (Neo)Forge port of Masa's mod code base, which basically contains all configurable options, a key binding system, support for doing most GUI code and other useful components for other mods to use (A ModConfigScreenRegister has been added to this base to register the configuration screen). [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib) is short for Masa's Litemods Library, and the forge port follows this nomenclature, currently called MaFgLib (Masa's mod Forge port Library).
